title: Discrete Mathematics - Set Theory and Algebra - Abelian Group

questions.question:
\( (\text{G}, \ast ) \) is an abelian group. Then



Set Theory & Algebra: ISRO CSE 2018 | Question: 17
options: \( x= x^{-1} \) for any \( x \) belonging to \( \text{G} \)
\( x=x^{2} \) for any \( x \) belonging to \( \text{G} \)
\( \left( x \ast y \right )^{2}= x^{2} \ast y^{2} \) , for any \( x, y \) belonging to \( \text{G} \)
questions.correct_answer: \( \left( x \ast y \right )^{2}= x^{2} \ast y^{2} \) , for any \( x, y \) belonging to \( \text{G} \)
